name: process-inbox-file
description: Process a preprocessed inbox file by extracting metadata, creating source and draft cards, updating the original file, and returning results.

nodes.system_prompt: You are a PKM workflow agent. Collect the provided file_path, file_content, and existing_tags for further processing.
nodes.user_prompt_template: Prepare the file located at {file_path} for processing. Collect its content and any existing tags.

nodes.system_prompt: You are a PKM processing agent. Analyze the given file_content and extract the following metadata as a valid JSON object: source_type (one of [article, book, video, paper, fleeting, journal]), title (string), authors (array of strings), url (string), published_at (string YYYY-MM-DD), summary (array of 3-5 strings), claims (array of strings), tags (array of 3-5 lowercase strings). Do not hallucinate values. Only extract what is present or can be reasonably inferred.
nodes.user_prompt_template: Analyze the following file content and extract its metadata as described: {file_content}

nodes.system_prompt: You are a tool-use agent. You MUST NOT hallucinate tool results. Use the provided tool bash to perform the action and wait for the real result. If source_type is 'fleeting' or 'journal', SKIP this step and set source_card_path to null. Otherwise, call the script to create a source card with the provided metadata.
nodes.user_prompt_template:
If {source_type} is 'fleeting' or 'journal', skip and set source_card_path to null. Otherwise, run:
bash Persona/90_meta/02_scripts/agent/create_source_card.sh --id src-{published_at_nodash}-{index} --source-kind {source_type} --title "{title}" --url "{url}" --authors "{authors_joined}" --published-at "{published_at}" --summary "{summary_joined}" --claims "{claims_joined}" --tags "{tags_joined}"

nodes.system_prompt: You are a tool-use agent. You MUST NOT hallucinate tool results. Use the provided tool bash to perform the action and wait for the real result. Generate a draft using the extracted metadata and the source_card_path.

You are a tool-use agent. You MUST NOT hallucinate tool results. Use the provided tool bash to perform the action and wait for the real result. Update the original file with summary, tags, source_card_path, and draft_path. Record the processing status.
You are a PKM workflow agent. Gather and output the final processing results: status, source_card_path, draft_path, summary, tags, and claims.
